steps.title: Connect praise to the award
steps.content: The first sentence says the album received critical attention and praise. The next sentence says few were surprised when it won an award, so the transition must show a result.

steps.title: Use a result transition
steps.content: The matching transition signals that the unsurprising award win follows from the album's strong reception. Choice A signals frequency, Choice C signals contrast, and Choice D signals concession. The answer is B.
